history.content:
<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is a safe floor cell, while the goal is farther ahead and slightly to the right. Moving forward keeps me progressing toward the open area without stepping into lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing toward the row with lava immediately in front of me, so moving forward would be unsafe. The goal is visible ahead but slightly offset, and the safest next step is to turn left to reorient toward the open space.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The space directly ahead is a wall, so moving forward is impossible. Turning right will let me face along the open corridor toward the free cell.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The cells directly ahead are lava, so I should not move forward. I need to change direction to avoid the lava and head toward the open area and goal; turning left is the safest next step.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing a wall directly ahead, so forward is blocked. Turning right should align me with the open path in the corridor.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing up. The cell in front is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. To avoid the lava and navigate toward the open area and goal, I should turn left.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing up and the cell directly ahead is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The open path is to my right, so I should turn right to face it.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing up and the cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The safest immediate move is to turn left to face away from the lava and look for a safe path around it toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead is a wall, so I cannot go forward. The open cell to my right is the only immediate safe direction, so I will turn right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. I need to change orientation to avoid it; turning right will face a safer direction and let me continue navigating around the hazard toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible above and slightly left, but the cell directly ahead is empty and safe. Moving forward brings me closer to the open path toward the goal, while avoiding the lava tiles nearby.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
